package rulefixtures

// scenario for errors_new_for_static_sentinel: `errors.New("some error")` called repeatedly in hot paths instead of a package-level sentinel
// fixture polarity: positive; family: performance; severity: info.
type Rule480PositiveRecord struct {
	ID int
	Name string
	Values []string
}

func scenario480Positive(records []Rule480PositiveRecord) int {
	total := 0
	for _, record := range records {
		for _, value := range record.Values {
			total += len(value) + record.ID
		}
	}
	return total
}
